prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；哈尔滨工业大学（本部）软科中国大学排名2026年第12名（Top20 ），威海校区共享校本部办学层次与品牌效应，属于国内顶尖工科院校阵营；2026年声誉评价中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第10（高热）， 短视频曝光量大，报考关注度持续较高；未见历史投档断档记录；哈尔滨工业大学拥有力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、控制科学 与工程A、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A等一批A类学科，威海校区招生专业覆盖上述优势学科方向，学科实力对考生有较强吸引力。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5147名、2026年计划小幅缩招（-1.6%）、河南省物理类考 生大幅增加约32%以及学校高热度的持续吸引力，竞争加剧是主导因素。预计2026年最低位次约5149名，区间4649–5649名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 6621 → 7180 → 5359 → 4551 → 5147, showing a fluctuating trend of first decreasing then increasing. From 2021 to 2022, the ranking moved back by about 559 places; in 2023, it significantly advanced to 5359; in 2024, it further advanced to 4551 (the best in the past 5 years); in 2025, it moved back to 5147, about 596 places behind 2024. The fluctuation range has been large in the past 3 years, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 5147. The enrollment plan for this university in Henan Province for science (physics category) was 136 in 2021, 135 in 2022, 99 in 2023, 87 in 2024, and 191 in 2025 (due to the merger of subject categories in the new college entrance examination reform, the plan increased significantly). The 2026 plan is 188, a decrease of 3 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 1.6%, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Harbin Institute of Technology (main campus) ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20). The Weihai campus shares the main campus's educational level and brand effect, belonging to the top domestic engineering university camp. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 10th (high heat), with high short video exposure and sustained high attention for application. No historical record of enrollment gaps. Harbin Institute of Technology has a number of A-class disciplines including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, and Software Engineering A. The Weihai campus enrollment majors cover these advantageous disciplines, and the disciplinary strength has strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (a significant increase from 2025). Based on the 2025 physics category proportion of 61.2%, it is estimated that there will be about 734,000 physics category candidates in 2026, an increase of about 32% from 555,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, not a local university in Henan Province, with no local enrollment preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Henan Province is about 6.6% (2025), which is a normal enrollment scale for an out-of-province 985 university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5147, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (-1.6%), the significant increase of about 32% in physics category candidates in Henan Province, and the sustained high popularity of the university, intensified competition is the dominant factor. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be about 5149, with a range of 4649–5649.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 5149, with a range of 4649–5649. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (within about 4800) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 top class majors; those with rankings in the middle part (around 5100) should mainly target Tier 2 Excellence Talent Programs; those with rankings in the lower part (outside about 5400) are advised to use Tier 3 as a safety option. Tier 1 majors are highly competitive, so it is recommended to combine personal interests with disciplinary evaluation strength for a comprehensive choice.

学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Harbin Institute of Technology (main campus) ranked 12th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings. Although not HIT's traditional trump cards, the 985 platform plus A-level discipline evaluations in economics and management still offer competitiveness.

The Weihai campus is located in Shandong Province, not a local university in Henan, so there is no local enrollment preference. 预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1382, the stable enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 32% in history category candidates in Henan Province, and the sustained appeal of the 985 level, competition intensification is the dominant factor. The estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1352 (a forward shift of about 30 places from 2025), with a range of 1152–1552.
